ddls:
CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Author's bio */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Author's profile picture URL */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date and time the author account was created */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the author account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the post */,
  "body" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date and time the post was created */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the post */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the post (e.g., draft, published, pending review) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the post */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of tags for the post */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the post */,
  "date_published" TEXT /* Date and time the post was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post version */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being versioned */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the post at the time of versioning */,
  "body" TEXT /* Content of the post at the time of versioning */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the post was updated */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes describing the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_versions_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_categories" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_tags" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the post */,
  "date_liked" TEXT /* Date and time the post was liked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who commented */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "date_commented" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  "reply_to" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being replied to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_reply_to FOREIGN KEY ("reply_to") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the post */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes for the post */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments for the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id")
)
